exercises.title: Trace DNS resolution
exercises.description: Run a full recursive trace for a public domain and follow the delegation chain.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can see root, TLD, and authoritative answers.

exercises.title: Inspect your records
exercises.description: Query A, MX, NS, and TXT records for a domain you control.
exercises.expected_outcome: You identify the different record types and their values.

exercises.title: Compare resolvers
exercises.description: Write a script that queries several public resolvers for the same name and reports differences.
exercises.expected_outcome: The script shows which resolvers agree and where answers differ.

exercises.title: Run a local resolver
exercises.description: Configure a local dnsmasq instance and map a custom local name to 127.0.0.1.
exercises.expected_outcome: The custom name resolves locally through your resolver.

exercises.title: Build a stub resolver
exercises.description: Parse a DNS A-record response and print the IP addresses from a UDP packet.
exercises.expected_outcome: The script decodes a response and prints answer records.

exercises.title: Create a DNS health checker
exercises.description: Poll a domain on a schedule, detect IP changes, and log when the answer changes.
exercises.expected_outcome: The checker reports answer changes and stable periods.
